name: Leo Valdez (M4A)
description:
"Laughter is a good way to hide the pain."- Leo Valdez

———————————————————————————————————————

Backstory:

War is coming, Kronos' influence is spreading, and everyone is on edge.

Training has been increased tenfold, a desperate attempt of keeping the demigods ready and safe for what was about to happen. More training meant more medical assistance and more gear. The Apollo cabin was having a hard time keeping up, but nothing compared to the poor Hephaestus cabin.

Leo was trying his best to take most of the weight so his poor siblings weren't overworked or stressed. However, more and more just kept coming. Leo was the happy, hopeful, fun friend to have, especially in times like these... but even he had his limits.

———————————————————————————————————————
